home.tagline: Pokea na tuma pesa mara moja. Bila benki. Bila ada zilizofichwa.
home.cobrar_sub: Tengeneza kiungo na kishirikishe na mteja wako
home.cobrar_tag: Pesa inaenda moja kwa moja kwenye kadi yako
home.trust_no_storage: Hakuna hifadhidata. Hakuna uhifadhi. Wewe na mteja wako tu.
home.trust_instant: Malipo ya papo hapo kupitia mtandao wa Visa / Mastercard

cobrar.title: Pokea malipo
cobrar.setup_hint: Mara moja tu. Stripe itathibitisha utambulisho wako.
cobrar.share_message: Malipo ya {amount} kwa {merchant}. Bonyeza kiungo kulipa:

pagar.card_hint: Namba 16 za kadi yako ya Visa au Mastercard
pagar.card_trust: Pesa inaingizwa moja kwa moja kwenye kadi yako.
pagar.error_invalid_account: Maelezo ya akaunti si sahihi. Angalia na jaribu tena.
pagar.account_trust_card: Kadi ya debit · kupitia Paysend / Visa Direct
pagar.processing_note_card: Pesa yako itafika kwa sekunde kwenye kadi yako
pagar.error_card_not_eligible: Kadi hii haistahili amana za kimataifa. Jaribu kadi nyingine au tumia akaunti ya benki.

remesa.title: Tuma pesa
remesa.kyc_warning: Kiasi zaidi ya $1,000 kinaweza kuhitaji uthibitisho wa utambulisho.
remesa.share_hint: Tuma kiungo hiki kwa mpokeaji kupitia WhatsApp:
remesa.charge_cad: Inachajiwa kwa CAD (bila ada ada ya FX Stripe)

resultado.failed_sub: Angalia maelezo yako na ujaribu tena.
resultado.receipt_invalid_sub: Risiti hii imebadilishwa au haikutengenezwa na OmniPay.
resultado.receipt_note: Risiti halisi. Haina data ya kadi.
resultado.wise_eta_note: Uhamisho unafika ndani ya siku 1-2 za kazi. SMS utakapopokea.

page.label_method: Njia ya malipo kwa mtoa huduma
page.footer_security: 🔒 Data ya akaunti imesimbwa — OmniPay haitahifadhi
page.error_account: Nambari ya akaunti si sahihi kwa nchi iliyochaguliwa.
page.error_amount: Ingiza kiasi sahihi zaidi ya sifuri.
page.share_quote_note: Kiasi halisi kinakokotolewa kwa kiwango cha benki cha wakati halisi wakati wa malipo.
page.loading_fx: Inapata kiwango cha benki cha wakati halisi…
page.liquidity_msg: Mistari yetu ya usindikaji wa kibiashara inakabiliwa na kiasi kikubwa cha makubaliano. Ili kuhakikisha uadilifu wa muamala wako, nafasi mpya za usindikaji zitafunguliwa katika dakika 15. Asante kwa uelewa wako.
page.done_msg: Makubaliano ya ada yameshughulikiwa kwa mafanikio. {name} atapokea uthibitisho kwa SMS.
page.error_default: Hatukuweza kushughulikia ombi. Hakuna malipo yaliyofanywa.
page.checkout_instant_badge: ⚡ Usindikaji wa kipaumbele (+1% ada ya mtandao)
page.checkout_trust: 🔒 Imelindwa na Stripe · Hatuhifadhi kadi yako kamwe
page.pwa_subtitle: Ufikiaji wa haraka kutoka simu yako
page.pwa_ios_steps: Bonyeza Shiriki (□↑) katika Safari → Ongeza kwenye Skrini ya Nyumbani → Ongeza
page.wa_msg_corporate:
{who} anaomba makubaliano ya ankara yake ya huduma.
Lipa hapa: {link}
page.wa_msg_individual:
{who} anaomba malipo ya ada yake ya kitaalamu ya {amount}.
Lipa hapa: {link}

landing.feat1_body: Tengeneza viungo vya malipo vilivyotiwa sahihi kwa sekunde chache.
landing.feat2_body: Viwango vya ubadilishaji vya Wise wakati halisi. CLABE · IBAN · ACH · PIX · UPI katika nchi 170+.
landing.feat3_body: Muundo wa kuhifadhi data sifuri. Takwimu zote zinasimbwa kwa AES-256-GCM upande wa mteja.
landing.pricing_sub: Hakuna ada ya kila mwezi. Hakuna ada ya usanidi. Lipa kwa kila muamala.
landing.pricing_standard_li2: ✓ Uhamishaji wa benki (SEPA · ACH · PIX · CLABE)
landing.pricing_instant_li2: ✓ Kadi za akaunti (Visa Direct · MC Send)
landing.pricing_instant_li3: ✓ Bora kwa malipo ya haraka ya kimataifa
landing.form_sub: Jaza maelezo hapa chini kuunda kiungo cha malipo salama.
landing.about_body: OmniPay ni miundombinu ya malipo — si benki. Tunaounganisha watumaji na wapokeaji kupitia washirika wa fedha wenye leseni. Hatushikii wala kuhifadhi fedha zako.
landing.disclaimer: OmniPay ni msuluhishi wa teknolojia ya malipo. Miamala yote inashughulikiwa na washirika wenye leseni (Bridge Financial Inc., Stripe, Wise). OmniPay haitunzi fedha kamwe.
landing.footer_disclaimer: OmniPay haishikii fedha · Washirika: Bridge, Stripe, Wise · Imesimbwa AES-256

p2p.share_hint: Share with whoever is sending you money:
p2p.feat1_body: Generate a link and share it with whoever is paying you. Receive on your card or bank account, no matter where you are.
p2p.feat2_body: Up to 60% cheaper than Western Union. Only 2% total (Bridge 0.75% + OmniPay 1.25%). No hidden margin on exchange rate.
p2p.feat3_body: Zero data architecture. Your bank details travel AES-256-GCM encrypted and are never stored on our servers.
p2p.pricing_sub: No hidden fees. No subscription. Pay only when you collect.
p2p.pricing_example: Example: $300 USD sent → total fee ~$6.99 (vs. ~$17 Western Union)
p2p.pricing_card1_li2: ✓ Delivery via SPEI, PIX, ACH, SEPA, card
p2p.form_sub: Enter your details and how much you want to receive. We will show you exactly how much the sender needs to send.
p2p.card_number_label: Nambari ya Kadi ya Mpokeaji (Visa / Mastercard)
p2p.fee_breakdown_title: How much should the sender send you?
p2p.card_or_bank: How do you want to receive the money?
p2p.error_card_unavailable: Malipo ya kadi hayapatikani kwa nchi hii. Kubadilika kwa uhamisho wa benki.
p2p.cobrar_subtitle: Generate your link, share it, and collect money from anywhere in the world
p2p.amount_receive_label: How much do you want to receive?
p2p.fee_approx_note: Estimated · exact rate set by Bridge at payment time
p2p.share_message_cobrar: {name} wants to receive {amount} {currency}. The sender needs to send {sender_amount} USD. Pay here: {link}
p2p.share_sender_must_send: The sender needs to send you
p2p.kyc_pending_body: Complete your identity verification (KYC) to activate collections. Only done once.
p2p.fee_sender_sees_own_currency: The sender will see the exact amount in their currency when they open the link
p2p.p2p_header_sub: Recipient fills in their details — sender gets the payment link
p2p.canada_info: Transfers from Canada to another country, or to a Canadian account. Via Wise — processed manually until Bridge is active.
p2p.canada_created_sub: The sender must transfer to this account
p2p.canada_wise_note: 📌 The Wise CAD account number will be sent via WhatsApp.
p2p.canada_processing_note: We process the transfer via Wise within 1-2 business days.
